title: Red Hat Security Advisory: golang security update
overview:
An update for golang is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9.2 Update Services for SAP Solutions.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Moderate. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux AppStream E4S (v.9.2)
full_text:
Red Hat Security Advisory: golang security update

An update for golang is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9.2 Update Services for SAP Solutions.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Moderate. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

An update for golang is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9.2 Update Services for SAP Solutions.

Red Hat Product Security has rated this update as having a security impact of Moderate. A Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) base score, which gives a detailed severity rating, is available for each vulnerability from the CVE link(s) in the References section.

Updated Packages:
golang-1.19.13-19.el9_2.src.rpm
golang-1.19.13-19.el9_2.x86_64.rpm
golang-bin-1.19.13-19.el9_2.x86_64.rpm
golang-docs-1.19.13-19.el9_2.noarch.rpm
golang-misc-1.19.13-19.el9_2.noarch.rpm
golang-race-1.19.13-19.el9_2.x86_64.rpm
golang-src-1.19.13-19.el9_2.noarch.rpm
golang-tests-1.19.13-19.el9_2.noarch.rpm
golang-1.19.13-19.el9_2.ppc64le.rpm
golang-bin-1.19.13-19.el9_2.ppc64le.rpm
golang-1.19.13-19.el9_2.aarch64.rpm
golang-bin-1.19.13-19.el9_2.aarch64.rpm
golang-1.19.13-19.el9_2.s390x.rpm
golang-bin-1.19.13-19.el9_2.s390x.rpm

CVE-2025-47907: A flaw was found in database/sql. Concurrent queries can produce unexpected results when a query is cancelled during a Scan method call on returned Rows, creating a race condition. This vulnerability allows an attacker who can initiate and cancel queries to trigger this condition, possibly leading to inconsistent data being returned to the application.
